SELECT date_part(['year'], event_time) AS event_year FROM events WHERE event_year > 1990;
SELECT date_part(['month', 'day'], event_time) AS month_day FROM events WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMPTZ '1994-01-01 00:00:00-07';
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT, signup_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1993-03-12 09:00:00-07'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '1994-11-25 12:30:00-07');
SELECT u.user_id, date_part(['year', 'month'], u.signup_time) AS signup_ym, date_part(['day'], e.event_time) AS event_day FROM users u JOIN events e ON e.event_time > u.signup_time;
WITH event_dates AS (SELECT date_part(['year', 'month'], event_time) AS ym FROM events) SELECT ym, COUNT(*) FROM event_dates GROUP BY ym;
SELECT date_part(['year'], event_time) AS event_year, COUNT(*) FROM events GROUP BY event_year HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT date_part(['day'], e.event_time) AS event_day FROM events e WHERE e.event_time > TIMESTAMPTZ '1990-01-01 00:00:00-07';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT date_part(['year', 'month', 'day'], event_time) FROM events) AS event_parts;
